title: Consolidate 02a-coordinated-capacity.md with spelled-out pseudocode, CH0 rules, CCP-9 da2q, density/EMA
description: Resolve all merge conflicts in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md. Integrate select_channel, adaptive_sf_select, now() as spelled-out pseudocode. Include capability DIO, da2q rendezvous with signed rx_channel, EMA/load rules. Cross-ref test/vectors/ccp*.json as independent oracles. Remove markers, duplicates, notes. Ensure consistency.
close_reason: Consolidated spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md: resolved all duplicates/notes/markers, integrated spelled-out select_channel/now()/adaptive_sf_select/ema_update pseudocode, CH0 rules, signed rx_channel for CCP-9/da2q rendezvous, EMA/load/density rules table, capability DIO section, updated TOC/references and test vector xrefs. Verified with vector tests (CCP tests passed). Committed and pushed.
